feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Lavender outskirts after walking through Rock Tunnel.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red warned that Lavender is quiet in a way Kanto has not been so far.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill decoded the Echo Flute pulse as a Pokemon Tower signal rather than a normal route beacon.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight has scouts around Lavender, using grief and sleep pressure to mask their operation.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket lookouts are watching Lavender's road, proving Giovanni expected Antman to follow the signal.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Pokemon Tower is confirmed as the next source of the Echo Flute anomaly.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Pokemon Tower entry is now unlocked for the next story slice.
